title: Create: Full Automation
description: A QOL Create Mod add-on that unlocks more automatable create stuff in a vanilla style.
body:
**Create: Full Automation** is a create mod addon focused around adding balanced and vanilly-styled recipes to many items that couldn't previously be automated! It adds recipes for almost every decorative block including all the Create Mod stone types, as well as Tuff, Calcite, Dripstone, Basalt, Magma Blocks, Deepslate, and Dirt. We also added recipes to allow automation of Brass and Lapis Lazuli (Don't worry, the recipes are very balanced). There is also a recipe for creating throwable ink bottles using Create: Enchantment Industry's Ink fluid to allow easier automation of hyper experience. For more information on all the recipes see the images tab.
Hope you enjoy! :)

Originally created for the **Snackbag Modded SMP** - [www.snackbag.net](https://www.snackbag.net/)

Also **shoutout to MrAtomicBombHead** for collaborating with me on this project (visit [his YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@mratomicbombhead))
